Agent.Name: WeWork

Variable.Help: Get your webhook URL from a WeWork group robot.
Variable.Default: USE YOUR OWN WEBHOOK VALUE HERE

Variable.Help: Specify the fields which are included in the title of the notification.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body of the notification.

Agent.Script: #!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############ # Expand \n sequences in config values to actual newlines TITLE=$(printf '%b' "$TITLE") MESSAGE=$(printf '%b' "$MESSAGE") case "$IMPORTANCE" in normal) EMOJI="🔵" COLOR="info" ;; warning) EMOJI="⚠️" COLOR="warning" ;; alert) EMOJI="🚨" COLOR="warning" ;; *) EMOJI="🔵" COLOR="info" ;; esac # Title: collapse to single line TITLE_LINE=$(printf '%s' "$TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ */ /g; s/^ *//; s/ *$//') # Build content with actual newlines (use $'\n' so sed can later re-encode them for JSON) NL=$'\n' # Heading CONTENT="## ${EMOJI} ${APP_NAME}${NL}> [${IMPORTANCE}] ${TITLE_LINE}" # Message body: prefix each non-empty line with "> " if [ -n "$MESSAGE" ]; then MSG_FORMATTED=$(printf '%s' "$MESSAGE" | sed '/./s/^/> /') CONTENT="${CONTENT}${NL}${MSG_FORMATTED}" fi # Link if [ -n "$LINK" ]; then CONTENT="${CONTENT}${NL}${NL}> [查看详情](${LINK})" fi # JSON-encode: escape \ and ", then convert real newlines to \n for JSON transport ESCAPED=$(printf '%s' "$CONTENT" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\\/\\\\/g;s/"/\\"/g;s/\n/\\n/g') PAYLOAD="{\"msgtype\":\"markdown_v2\",\"markdown_v2\":{\"content\":\"${ESCAPED}\"}}" curl -s -X POST \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d "$PAYLOAD" \ --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 \ "$WEBH_URL" > /dev/null 2>&1 exit 0
